variants: Flavien Bouyx specializes in civil engineering and is a proud member of the Vaporveil Steamwrights. He credits much of his success to his mentor, Kelvin Dlamini, who provided invaluable guidance throughout his academic career. Flavien is recognized for his expertise with the Fractal Climatologist Badge, which reflects his commitment to understanding complex environmental systems. His research and projects often receive support from the Curio Pathmakers Council, which serves as his primary funding source. Through his contributions, he continues to make a significant impact in the field of civil engineering.
